commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a0d15e2fc8ee27afcce4b0ef1df130db0eb0c9e9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR exports the workspace-relative avatar data-URI resolver, calls it from `agent.identity.get`, and changes the Personal card avatar URL fallback to stop forcing local avatars through `/avatar/<agentId>`.

PR surface: Source +3. Total +3 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main routes workspace-relative identity avatars from `agent.identity.get` to an auth-gated `/avatar/<agentId>` URL while `agents.list` can inline the same avatar as a data URI.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up to fix the compile blockers and provide real behavior proof; automation should not replace the missing external proof for this PR.

target.title: fix(control-ui): resolve Personal card avatar 401 via data URI
target.body: ## Problem Fixes #97602 The Personal card in Control UI shows a broken avatar image (401) because `agent.identity.get` returns `/avatar/` — a path requiring Bearer auth — while `agents.list` correctly resolves workspace-relative avatars to base64 data URIs. Since `` tags cannot carry Authorization headers, the Personal card always fails. ## Root Cause Two RPC handlers resolve agent avatars differently: | RPC | Avatar resolution | Result | |-----|-------------------|--------| | `agents.list` | `resolveIdentityAvatarUrl()` reads file → base64 data URI | ✅ Works | | `agent.identity.get` | `resolveAssistantAvatarUrl()` → `/avatar/` path | ❌ 401 | Additionally, the frontend (`app-render.ts`) explicitly constructs `/avatar/` via `buildAssistantAvatarRoute()` when `avatarStatus === "local"`, bypassing any data URI the backend might return. ## Changes ### 1. `src/gateway/session-utils.ts` - Export `resolveIdentityAvatarUrl` (was private) ### 2. `src/gateway/server-methods/agent.ts` - Import `resolveIdentityAvatarUrl` - In `agent.identity.get` handler, try `resolveIdentityAvatarUrl()` first (returns data URI for workspace-relative paths), falling back to `resolveAssistantAvatarUrl()` for other avatar types ### 3. `ui/src/ui/app-render.ts` - Remove `buildAssistantAvatarRoute()` call for local avatars in Personal card config - Use the data URI returned by the RPC (via `assistantAvatarUrl`) instead of constructing an unauthenticated URL path ## Testing - Configure an agent with `identity.avatar = "avatar/photo.jpg"` (workspace-relative path) - Verify chat page avatar still displays (data URI from `agents.list`) - Verify Personal card avatar now displays (data URI from `agent.identity.get`) - Verify no 401 on `/avatar/` endpoint in browser network tab for Personal card
target.author: mtuwei
